notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Oswald Peraza out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Adam Frazier pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Adam Frazier singles on a ground ball to right fielder Everson Pereira. Nolan Schanuel to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Yoán Moncada pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yoán Moncada lines out to shortstop Colson Montgomery.

notableEvents.label: Mike Trout reached on error
notableEvents.detail: White Sox challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Mike Trout reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Colson Montgomery.
